hooks.command:
input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -q 'git push' && printf '
⚠️  [RSS] Pushed to landing. New content? Update src/data/rss-entries.ts
    Types: guide_release | new_page | new_cheatcard | new_whitepaper | new_section
    File: /Users/florianbruniaux/Sites/perso/claude-code-ultimate-guide-landing/src/data/rss-entries.ts
' || true
